sentences.grammar_note: Masculine singular; verb conjugation for 3rd person
Masculine plural with definite article (les); plural adjective (gentils)
Passé composé with avoir; definite article (le)

sentences.target: Le patron a demandé une réunion importante.
sentences.translation: The boss asked for an important meeting.
sentences.grammar_note: Passé composé, 3rd person singular; adjective agreement (importante, feminine to match réunion)

sentences.target: Les patrons ont décidé de fermer le bureau.
sentences.translation: The bosses decided to close the office.
sentences.grammar_note: Passé composé, 3rd person plural; infinitive construction (de fermer)
Possessive adjective (mon) with masculine noun; predicate adjective (occupé)

sentences.target: Le patron de cette entreprise est célèbre.
sentences.translation: The boss of this company is famous.
sentences.grammar_note: Prepositional phrase (de cette entreprise); predicate adjective (célèbre)
